subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast confessed and believed in the Words of God! Thank God, for He hath uncovered the veil from before thine eye
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
